# Add Voice Input Support to AI Agent

## Description
Add voice-to-text functionality to the AI agent chat interface, allowing users to speak their requests instead of typing them.

## Type
- **Type:** New Feature
- **Priority:** Medium
- **Component:** AI Agent, UI/UX
- **Milestone:** AI Agent v1.1

## Use Case
Users can click a microphone button and say "Schedule a meeting with John tomorrow at 3pm" and the AI will process the voice input and respond accordingly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Voice input button in chat interface
- [ ] Real-time speech-to-text conversion
- [ ] Support for multiple languages
- [ ] Visual feedback during voice recording
- [ ] Fallback to text input if voice fails
- [ ] Accessibility support for voice commands
- [ ] Handle background noise and accents

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Integrate Web Speech API or similar service
- [ ] Add voice recording UI components
- [ ] Implement voice input error handling
- [ ] Add language detection and support
- [ ] Ensure accessibility compliance
- [ ] Add voice input settings and preferences

## Implementation Notes
- Use Web Speech API for browser-based speech recognition
- Consider fallback to cloud-based services for better accuracy
- Implement proper error handling for unsupported browsers
- Add visual indicators for voice recording state
- Consider privacy implications and user consent
